title: Team start: WS1 token fitness measurement
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Breezy Sailing Pier / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26.
- Foundation: complete; live checks show no active claims, no active commit queue, clean git status, and no directed inbox messages.
- Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts, agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.unit.test.ts, agent-tools/src/practice-fitness/**, thread identity row, and this session collaboration state.
- Useful capability: implement WS1 token measurement display and validation with content-only semantics.
- Constraint or risk: do not skip to token frontmatter, convention docs, or manifest coverage before WS1 lands.
- Preferred boundary: sole implementer unless a live peer appears.

Team route:
- Coordination pressure: low; no other agents live in claims or queue.
- Operating shape: solo implementer with normal comms/claim visibility.
- Temporary responsibilities: Breezy owns WS1 implementation and acceptance checks.
- Decision default if silent: keep changes pathspec-tight to WS1.
- Evidence expected: focused Vitest, type-check, lint, build, and practice fitness informational.
- Expiry or next review point: after WS1 acceptance checks.
- Closeout owner: Breezy for this WS1 session boundary.
